title: Village Guidance — The Cave
description: After prologue, NPCs hint that the Whispering Cave to the northwest is where the monsters are coming from.

lines.speaker: Elder Theron
lines.text: The cave is to the northwest. Follow the road past the signpost. You can't miss it — it's the one making all the noise.

lines.speaker: Elder Theron
lines.text: Stock up at Bram's shop before you go. His swords are untested but his prices are honest. Mostly.
